Range RENAULT13-aRE

OBD Information

Protocol: KWP2000
Send ID:
Recv ID:
Baudrate:
Func Addr: 32
Func Name: Superviseur

        "firstbyte": 25,

      },

      },

        "firstbyte": 37,

      },

        "firstbyte": 38,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 35,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 36,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 30,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 31,
        "ref": true
